productDisplayName: Nike Black Dri-fit Cotton     Cricket  Track Pants
description: CompositionBlack trackpants made of 65% cotton and 35% polyester, is engineered with Dri-Fit technology, has an elasticated waist with drawcords, two side pockets and embroidered nike swoosh logo on the left thighWarranty for manufacturing defects: 6 months (not valid on products with more than 20% discount)FittingComfortWash careMachine wash cold with like coloursDo not dry clean, bleach or lay on itself when wetTumble dry lowDo not ironDesigned for the man who never compromises on comfort and style, this trackpant from nike is crafted from a cotton-polyester blend fabric to offer exemplary comfort and a flattering fit. The Dri-Fit technology ensures you enjoy your cricket matches and casual outings in sweat-free comfort. Add on sporty t-shirts and sneakers.
